module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input d,
    output reg q);always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        q <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        q <= d;
    end
end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
